page.content: The table presents characteristics across four groups: Group A (vaccines alone on day 1) (n = 20), Group B (vaccines 2 weeks before abatacept) (n = 20), Group C (vaccines 2 weeks after abatacept) (n = 20), and Group D (vaccines 8 weeks after abatacept) (n = 20).

page.content: For Age (years), the mean ages are 34 for Group A, 34 for Group B, 34 for Group C, and 36 for Group D, with standard deviations of 12, 13, 11, and 13 respectively, and ranges of 18–55 for Group A, 18–56 for Group B, 19–56 for Group C, and 20–56 for Group D. In terms of Gender (n (%)), Group A has 10 males (50%) and 10 females (50%), Group B has 8 males (40%) and 12 females (60%), Group C has 10 males (50%) and 10 females (50%), and Group D has 11 males (55%) and 9 females (45%). Regarding Race (n (%)), Group A includes 15 whites (75%), 5 blacks (25%), and 0 others, Group B consists of 12 whites (60%), 8 blacks (40%), and 0 others, Group C has 14 whites (70%), 6 blacks (30%), and 0 others, while Group D features 11 whites (55%), 8 blacks (40%), and 1 other (5%). This comprehensive overview encapsulates all specified data across the four groups.
